case_title: VICTOR GREEN VS. VASU, VIJAY, GUN SHOT DIGITAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GREEN, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT VASU, VIJAY, GUN SHOT DIGITAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VASU, VIJAY, GUN SHOT DIGITAL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASU, VIJAY, GUN SHOT DIGITAL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 29, 2012, DELIVER TO THE PLAINTIFF THE ECOMMERCE SITE FILES PROVIDED FOR UNDER PLAINTIFF'S CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
